markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Kick-off meeting between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content marketing strategy and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on cloud-based offerings and mid-market companies/web agencies as primary target audience](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Aim for 5% traffic increase, particularly rebounding blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Shift from community-written content to AI-assisted content generation, especially for top-of-funnel topics](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Prioritize US market growth while maintaining strong presence in Asia and Europe](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Integrate competitive analysis and address "alternative to Strapi" content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

## Topics

### Target Audience and Goals

  - [Primary focus: Cloud-based offerings for mid-market companies and web agencies](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Aiming for 5% traffic increase, especially rebounding blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Current sign-up rate: \~4-5% for cloud accounts](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Shift focus to self-serve subscriptions and product-led growth](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Content goal: Increase from 12 to 50+ articles per month](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Content Strategy and Process

  - [Current process involves community writers, keyword research, and technical review](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Challenges with time-consuming review process for technical content](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Opportunity to use AI for initial research, keyword topics, and outline creation](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Focus on both technical Strapi-specific content and broader tech topics](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Need for content addressing non-technical decision-makers (e.g., CMOs, agency leaders)](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=2852.0)

### Content Types and Priorities

  - [Technical tutorials for Strapi users](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Top-of-funnel content on trending topics and framework comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Educational content on headless CMS benefits and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=2959.0)
  - [Competitive comparison content (e.g., Strapi vs. alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Content modeling and editing experience from non-developer perspective](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=2852.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Key competitors: Sanity, Contentful, Storyblok](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Analyze top-performing competitor content for ideas](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Create targeted articles addressing "alternative to Strapi" searches](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Develop product comparison pages with strong SEO and conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

### Traffic and Conversion Optimization

  - [Focus on organic search due to challenges with paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
  - [Utilize HubSpot for conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Request access to Google Ads and Search Console for data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Integrate conversion data into content strategy decisions](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### Collaboration and Workflow

  - [GrowthX to provide calibration articles for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Aim to produce 10 articles per week after initial calibration](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Weekly performance updates (Mondays and Fridays)](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Utilize Notion for documentation and Slack for communication](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to digest information and send follow-up with action items](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Strapi to provide access to SEO audit, Google Ads, and Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [GrowthX to produce calibration articles for Strapi's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Set up weekly data review meetings to guide content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Follow up on Algolia integration progress and potential webinar](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)
  - [Share additional competitor insights and relevant industry resources](https://fathom.video/share/iRoxe-c3yxPyUjfug_CB4pG8kx1PcQt9?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
